active_ingredients: Active ingredient (in each drop) Menthol 5.8 mg
indications_and_usage: Uses temporarily relieves: cough as may occur with a cold occasional minor irritation and sore throat
dosage_and_administration: Directions adults and children 5 years and over - dissolve 1 lozenge slowly in mouth. Repeat every 2 hours as needed or as directed by a doctor. children under 5 years - ask a doctor
